description: Order of payment issued by Abū Zikrī Kohen to his banker, Abū l-Khayr Khiyyār, instructing him to pay the bearer 4 dinars and a half and an eighth of a dinar in cash (ʿayn) for grapes. Dated Av 1451 (= 1140 CE). (Information from CUDL)
tags: order of payment, cheque, Abu Zikri Kohen
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
